critical_issue_details.remarks: ICOG Earth switch TTR has been pending for a long period since ordering from Technocraft. Initially, the supplier had assured submission of the TTR prior to material delivery; however, the same could not be provided. Based on the supplier’s undertaking, approval was obtained from NTPC at the time of Inspection and delivery. Till date, even after material delivery, the supplier is unable to submit the Type Test Report, which is a serious concern. Due to non-submission of TTR, billing is also on hold, and the delay may adversely impact the project timeline.

1. CCTV -LOI issued on 27-Nov-25. Till date, the supplier is yet to comply with end-client requirements. MFC approval and material delivery at site need to be expedited on priority.
2. DG Set - LOI issued on 10-Apr-26. As on date, MFC documentation is under process. Need to expedite the approval process and ensure timely delivery at site.

Below are critical pending order.
1. Rate card issued for PSS - electrical 
BOQ shared with Anil - 19.09.2025
5. Rate card issued for TL - Electrical & Civil
BOQ shared with Anil - 19.09.2025 & 22.09.2025.

ROW issue at PSS & land due land & farmers payment.
Site work stopped since 7th Oct.

Vendor intimated that vendor can deliver 110kV CB by 42 weeks from MFC .
SCM & management need to takeup further with M/s Hitachi to arrange delivery in 16 weeks to meet project timelines.

1.2 Tower ROW clearance not given by Land team to start work at PGCIL approach section. 
2.To ramp up TL work - 5 gangs for tower erection & 2 gangs for stringing will require.

Budget issue internally in consultation with management yet to be resolved. 250 Mtrs compaction has been done.(First layer complted). Blaance work plan need to be shared. Site movement is not possible due to rain as per site input and work is on HOLD.
8 Bore hole testing has been done. Balance yet to be completed. Currently due to rain site access not available. (Wet soil condition)

Site movement is not possible due to rain as per site input and work is on HOLD.
Revised work schedule to be submitted to client.
MFC to be expedited for DC cable. Only partial MFC has been given. change in cable sizing discussion is going on with engineering team.

critical_issue_details.issue: Material delivery of Next tracker material
critical_issue_details.remarks: delivery of the material to be expedited/aligned internally from design & SCM team as per Billing plan given.
Amended budget along with revised design decision to be taken up on priority for client approval as well as execution commencement as per new design.

32 PILE CASTING HAS BEEN DONE. PULL TESTING REPORT HAS BEEN SUBMITTED TO SJVN TEAM. Report found satisfactory. Balance pull out testing work schedule yet to be submitted to SJVN   Site movement is not possible due to rain as per site input and work is on HOLD.
Site movement is not possible due to rain as per site input and work is on HOLD.

MFC & PO to be expedited.
Dependancy on Auxilary Transformer documenst and it is still awaited from vendor (10 KVA)

Construction: Boundry fencing work to be expedited. Vendor is less interested for boudnry fencing work. Need to expedite.Site movement is not possible due to rain as per site input and work is on HOLD.

critical_issue_details.issue: Slow progress by electrical contractor in PSS-2
critical_issue_details.remarks: 1. Durga construciton has not deployed sufficient manpower at PSS-2. Need to boost up.

critical_issue_details.issue: Time extension letter rejected from Mahagenco
critical_issue_details.remarks: Rays has submitted to time extension letter asking for extension of six months on the account of delay in connectivity. Mahagenco has denied the time extension. This denial has pose the risk of contractual milestone LD.
As per contract, we need to acquire 50% land by May month. As per kick-off meeting with Mahagenco, it is expected from us to acquire min. 50% land by June month.
We have not got the connectivity approval for the project. We are not able to start the engg. activities without knowing the location and rating of transmission line and switchyard.

Quality issue was observed in the pilling work wherein pilling was done without proper use of concrete. Upon identification of the issue. we conducted PIT and pull put tests on the piles. Test reports are received and are found to be satisfactory. Reports are submitted to client.

Site execution activities has come to the hold as there is less front available. There is increase in the overhead budget - site office expenses, guest house expenses, salary expenses due to increase in the project duration. We have demobilized some of the team members to reduce the cost. Also, existing vendors can demobilize as there are now idle and are reluctant to work for the project.

critical_issue_details.issue: Over-due payment still not received from Serentica
critical_issue_details.remarks: Rs. 9cr. is overdue (more than 21 days). Total due amount is Rs. 13 cr.

critical_issue_details.remarks: Drawings have been prepared as per AS built information received from Site team and uploaded on the drive. Site InCharge need to sign it off with client and close the documentation hand over formality.
Target date and status need to be updated till date for insurance claim.

critical_issue_details.remarks: Quality issue was observed in the pilling work wherein pilling was done without proper use of concrete. Upon identification of the issue. we conducted PIT and pull put tests on the piles. Test reports are received and are found to be satisfactory. Reports are submitted to client.

Site execution activities has come to the hold as there is less front available. There is increase in the overhead budget - site office expenses, guest house expenses, salary expenses due to increase in the project duration. We have demobilized some of the team members to reduce the cost. Also, existing vendors can demobilize as there are now idle and are reluctant to work for the project.

critical_issue_details.issue: Over-due payment still not received from Serentica
critical_issue_details.remarks: Rs. 9cr. is overdue (more than 21 days). Total due amount is Rs. 13 cr.

M/s Coronet scheduled type test at CPRI Noida was not conducted due to panel size issue. As per vendor, now type test is scheduled at CPRI Bhopal on 25th June. It was delayed the delivery timeline of ICOG. We have following up with the vendor for timely type test and inspection.

critical_issue_details.issue: Increase in the cost of piling by 4.3cr. (29% increase)
critical_issue_details.remarks: There is increase in no. of piles increased from 1.22lacs to 1.38 lacs. Also rate considered in the budget is for the auger. At site there is requirement of 50% auger and 50% DTH (encountering hard rock). We will be shifting the additional amount from the budget head where we foresee the savings. Details will be shared.
